Resolving them would require genuinely new comparison mathematics and/or changing the theorem-level positioning/claims in the proto, which cannot be fixed by permitted in-place proof, wiring, definition, or prose edits.
Open findings: below-field-novelty@thm:sample-regret-degeneracy, below-field-novelty@thm:population-length-frontier-degeneracy. Provide guidance via the D0 directive (a new direction / a paper to adapt / a reframing) and re-run, or rewind D0/D-1.2.
